prompts.en: We've put our three best-selling items into a bundle, priced so you save twenty-five percent compared to buying them separately. Available all month.
prompts.zh: 我們把三款熱賣商品組合成優惠包，比分開購買省下 25%，整月有效。

prompts.en: Just twenty-four hours — everything on the site is twenty percent off, no code needed. After midnight tonight, prices return to normal.
prompts.zh: 限時 24 小時，全站 8 折，無需折扣碼。今晚 12 點過後恢復原價。

prompts.en: Spend over one hundred dollars and we'll cover the shipping, anywhere we deliver. It's our way of saying thank you for trusting our store.
prompts.zh: 消費滿 100 美元，全區免運。這是我們對你支持的小小心意。

prompts.en: Members get something exclusive this week — sign in, look for the gold badge, and you'll find a five-dollar credit waiting in your cart.
prompts.zh: 本週會員專屬優惠：登入帳號，找到金色標章，購物車內就有 5 美元購物金等你。

prompts.en: We noticed something in your cart — and we held onto it for you. Use code BACK10 at checkout for ten percent off, valid for the next forty-eight hours.
prompts.zh: 你購物車裡的商品我們先為你保留。結帳輸入 BACK10 享 9 折，48 小時內有效。

prompts.en: Cyber Monday is live across the entire store, with our deepest discounts of the year. Best sellers go fast — bookmark your favorites now.
prompts.zh: 網路星期一全店優惠正式上線，是一年中折扣最深的一天。熱銷商品很快會被搶光，快點收藏。

prompts.en: First time shopping with us? Welcome — use the code HELLO10 at checkout for ten percent off your first order.
prompts.zh: 第一次來嗎？歡迎你！結帳時輸入 HELLO10 即享首單 9 折。

prompts.en: Three orders and you reach our gold tier — free shipping, early access to new drops, and a birthday surprise every year.
prompts.zh: 下單三次即升至金級會員：享免運、新品優先購買權、每年生日驚喜。

prompts.en: Pair these two best-sellers and save twenty-five percent compared to buying them separately. The bundle is on the product page now.
prompts.zh: 兩款熱銷商品組合購入省 25%，組合包現已上線商品頁。

prompts.en: Hi there, and thank you for stopping by. I'm here to walk you through anything you need — feel free to send me a message anytime.
prompts.zh: 嗨，歡迎光臨，謝謝你來看看我們。如果有任何疑問，隨時可以傳訊息給我。

prompts.en: Hello — happy to help you find what you're looking for. Let me know what catches your eye or just tell me the problem you're trying to solve.
prompts.zh: 您好，很高興為您挑選合適的商品。告訴我您喜歡的款式，或您想解決的問題都可以。

prompts.en: Quick update on your order — it has been packed and handed to the courier this morning. You should receive it in three to five business days.
prompts.zh: 您的訂單進度更新：今天上午已包裝完成並交付物流，預計 3-5 個工作天送達。

prompts.en: I'm sorry the item didn't work out for you. We've started the return on your behalf — your refund will land in three to five business days.
prompts.zh: 很抱歉商品未能達到您的期待。我們已為您啟動退貨，款項將於 3-5 個工作天內退回。

prompts.en: Our brand started in a small studio with one idea: that everyday objects deserve to be made with the care of something special. We've never stopped following that idea.
prompts.zh: 我們的品牌始於一間小工作室，只有一個想法：日常用品也值得被認真打磨。這個想法，我們從未放下。

prompts.en: Every package we ship is made from recycled fiber, and we plant a tree for every order. Small steps, taken every day, by a small team that cares.
prompts.zh: 我們所有包裝皆使用再生纖維製作，每筆訂單都會種下一棵樹。微小的步伐，每天累積，由一個用心的小團隊持續實踐。

prompts.en: Here are three reasons people switch to our product and never go back — number two surprised even us when we first tested it.
prompts.zh: 以下是三個讓人轉用我們產品就回不去的理由，其中第二點連我們團隊第一次測試時都很意外。

prompts.en: Did you know there's a small trick most people miss when using a product like this? Let me show you what changes when you try it.
prompts.zh: 你知道嗎？大多數人使用這類產品時都會錯過一個小技巧。讓我示範它的效果。

prompts.en: Quick fifteen-second tip — if you've been using this the regular way, try this one instead, and you'll see the difference immediately.
prompts.zh: 15 秒小技巧：如果你一直照習慣使用這個產品，試試這個方法，馬上看見差別。

prompts.en: Today I'm taking you behind the scenes of how this is actually made, from the workshop floor to the final inspection.
prompts.zh: 今天帶你進入幕後，看看這項商品從工廠到最後檢驗的真實過程。

prompts.en: Here's the before, and here's the after. Same product, two minutes apart — the difference comes down to one simple step.
prompts.zh: 這是使用前，這是使用後。同一個產品，相隔兩分鐘，關鍵就在一個簡單的步驟。

prompts.en: Quick rapid-fire answers to the most-asked questions: how big it is, how long it lasts, and whether it's safe for sensitive skin. Let's go.
prompts.zh: 快速回覆三個最常見問題：尺寸、耐用度、敏感肌是否適用。馬上開始。

prompts.en: May the new year bring you health, harmony, and a kitchen that always smells like good food. Thank you for being part of our story this year.
prompts.zh: 祝你新的一年身體健康、家庭和樂，廚房永遠飄著美食香氣。感謝你陪伴我們走過今年的每一步。

prompts.en: Wishing you and your family a peaceful Mid-Autumn — may the moon be bright, the tea be warm, and the people you love be near.
prompts.zh: 祝你與家人中秋平安團圓，月色明亮、茶水溫暖、所愛之人都在身邊。

prompts.en: Merry Christmas from all of us — thank you for an incredible year of stories, orders, and feedback. See you in the new year, brighter than before.
prompts.zh: 我們團隊在此祝你聖誕快樂。感謝這一年的故事、訂單與寶貴意見，新年再見，更上一層樓。

prompts.en: Whoever you're celebrating with this Valentine's — even if it's just yourself — we hope today feels a little softer, a little warmer.
prompts.zh: 今年情人節，無論你和誰一起度過，甚至只有自己，希望這一天都能多一點柔軟與溫暖。

prompts.en: Happy Mother's Day to every mom out there — and to anyone who's been a mom to someone, in any form. We see you, and we appreciate you.
prompts.zh: 母親節快樂，獻給所有的媽媽，也獻給以任何形式照顧過他人的人。我們看見你，謝謝你。

prompts.en: As this year comes to a close, thank you — to our customers, our team, and everyone who shared our story. Here's to another year of doing it better, together.
prompts.zh: 年末將至，感謝每一位顧客、團隊夥伴，與每一位分享我們故事的人。新的一年，我們一起做得更好。

prompts.en: In the next sixty seconds I'll walk you through the three steps to get the most out of this — most people stop at step two, so stay till the end.
prompts.zh: 接下來 60 秒，我會用三個步驟教你發揮這個產品最大價值。大多數人在第二步就停了，請看到最後。

prompts.en: Three quick tips to keep this looking new — wipe with a damp cloth, avoid direct sun for long periods, and store flat when not in use.
prompts.zh: 三個保養小提醒：濕布輕擦、避免長時間直曬、不使用時平放收納。

prompts.en: Just got mine today, so let's open it together — first impression, what's inside, and what surprised me right out of the box.
prompts.zh: 今天剛拿到，我們一起開箱：第一印象、內容物，以及讓我意外的小細節。

prompts.en: Today I'm comparing two options most people consider — what's similar, what's different, and which one is right for which kind of customer.
prompts.zh: 今天比較兩個多數人會考慮的選擇：相似之處、差異點，以及不同顧客適合哪一款。

prompts.en: You've been sending us questions all week. Today I'm answering the three most-asked ones — and I'm bringing receipts.
prompts.zh: 這週你們傳來很多問題，今天我會回答最多人問的三題，且附上實際證明。

prompts.en: Big team announcement today — starting next month we'll be expanding shipping to three new regions. Details and timelines are in the description.
prompts.zh: 今天有一個重要消息：下個月起，我們將拓展物流至三個新區域，詳情與時間表請見下方說明。

prompts.en: Welcome to the livestream — for the next hour I'll be answering your questions live, showing the products in real time, and dropping a flash discount halfway through.
prompts.zh: 歡迎來到直播。接下來一小時我會即時回答你的問題、現場示範產品，並會在中段釋出限時優惠。

prompts.en: That's all for today — thank you for watching, thank you for sharing, and we'll see you in the next one. Take care.
prompts.zh: 今天就到這裡。謝謝你的觀看與分享，下次再見。請好好照顧自己。
